fields.description: Add a set of E2E tests that replay a sampling of 20 tickets through plan review. Populate this sample with a static set of tickets from rebar history. The sample should include both container and leaf tickets and some tickets that trigger overlays. At least half of the sample should be tickets that returned a large number of findings. Tickets should include those that return indeterminate findings, blocking findings, and dropped findings. Replay should include both full plan review and partial re-review triggered by code drift. Replay should use a pinned version of the codebase based on the version used during the original ticket reviews. This should be an argument passed with the plan review command, not something we need to create bespoke code to handle. The only mock used by these tests should be the LLM calls. We should populate the mock with actual responses from live LLM calls using the sample ticket data (separate calls for each sample and call). We should document this process so that when the LLM calls in plan review change, we update these E2E tests accordingly. Our goal is for this to be a high fidelity E2E test of the plan review process. The tests should note observed tool use calls and budget usage from the live calls that populate the test sample so that the tests can fail appropriately if budget or tool use would exceed configured thresholds.
